original_caption_excerpt:
Confident, social teens share a hidden biological trait: microbes influenced by their dogs. When scientists transferred these microbes to mice, they found something unexpected. 

Swipe to find out. 👀
adapted_hook: Seu cão molda seu *microbioma*. E talvez seu humor.
adapted_subline: Crianças que convivem com cães carregam micróbios distintos. Transferidos a camundongos, alteraram comportamento social.
visual_prompt: Vertical 9:16 composition (1080x1920px). Deep forest green background #000F08, completely flat, no gradients, no texture noise. Centered vertical text block occupying the middle 60% of canvas, with 20% empty forest space on top and 20% on bottom (bottom 15% strictly reserved empty for logo overlay — DO NOT draw any logo, watermark, badge, rectangle, or placeholder). Typography: DM Sans Light, never serif. Top eyebrow label in DM Sans Light, off-white #f8fffc at 50% opacity, letter-spaced uppercase, small size, reading: 'MICROBIOMA'. Below, main headline in DM Sans Light, off-white #f8fffc, large size, three lines, reading exactly: 'Seu cão molda seu' / '*microbioma*.' / 'E talvez seu humor.' — where the word 'microbioma' appears in DM Sans Light Italic and in gold #C89136, while the rest stays off-white. Below headline, a thin 1px horizontal divider line in gold #C89136 at 40% opacity, 80px wide, centered. Below divider, subline in DM Sans Light, off-white #f8fffc at 60% opacity, two lines centered, reading: 'Crianças que convivem com cães carregam micróbios distintos. Transferidos a camundongos, alteraram comportamento social.' Editorial restraint, Aesop-meets-Mito aesthetic. Anti: pure white #FFFFFF, red, amber, orange, drop shadows, bevels, neon, glow, people, faces, hands, dogs, animals, medical icons, gauges, illustrations, photographs.
caption_pt: Adolescentes mais sociáveis compartilham uma assinatura microbiana — e ela carrega impressões dos cães com quem convivem. Quando pesquisadores transferiram esses micróbios a camundongos, o comportamento social mudou. O eixo intestino-cérebro continua nos surpreendendo.
why_this_works: O ICP brasileiro premium responde a ciência inesperada com framing editorial — não a 'curiosidades de pet'. Ancorar no eixo microbioma-comportamento (tema quente em longevidade) eleva o achado de viral anglo a insight sofisticado, mantendo a tensão narrativa do original sem traduzi-lo.
